title: DHL Group Marks Sustainability Milestones in Asia with SAF and EV Expansion
content: DHL Group has announced significant progress in its sustainability roadmap across the Asia Pacific region. Key 2025 milestones include strategic Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF) agreements signed by DHL Express with partners such as Cathay, Cosmo Energy, and Neste, securing nearly 20 million liters of SAF for flights departing Narita, Incheon, and Singapore. The company also highlighted the success of its GoGreen Plus service, used by over 153,000 customers to reduce Scope 3 emissions. On the ground, DHL has expanded its fleet to over 1,800 electric vehicles (EVs) region-wide, including deployments in the Philippines, Korea, China, and Thailand, alongside the introduction of hydrogen-powered trucks in Japan. Additionally, DHL Supply Chain unveiled its first facility globally to be fully powered by on-site renewable energy in Thailand, eliminating reliance on the fossil-fuel grid.
author: Analysts Account
